He was sweating so much so that the drops of the sweat were dropping like pearls though it was a (cold) wintry day. When that state of Allah's Messenger ﷺ was over, he was smiling and the first word he said, `Aisha! Thank Allah, for Allah has declared your innocence.' My mother told me to go to Allah's Messenger ﷺ . I replied, 'By Allah I will not go to him and will not thank but Allah.' So Allah revealed: "Verily! They who spread the slander are a gang among you . . ." (24.11) When Allah gave the declaration of my Innocence, Abu Bakr, who used to provide for Mistah bin Uthatha for he was his relative, said, 'By Allah, I will never provide Mistah with anything because of what he said about Aisha.' But Allah later revealed: -- "And let not those who are good and wealthy among you swear not to help their kinsmen, those in need and those who left their homes in Allah's Cause. Let them forgive and overlook. Do you not wish that Allah should forgive you? Verily! Allah is Oft-forgiving, Most Merciful." (24.22) After that Abu Bakr said, 'Yes ! By Allah! I like that Allah should forgive me,' and resumed helping Mistah whom he used to help before. Allah's Messenger ﷺ also asked Zainab bint Jahsh (i.e. the Prophet ﷺ's wife about me saying, 'What do you know and what did you see?' She replied, 'O Allah's Messenger ﷺ! I refrain to claim hearing or seeing what I have not heard or seen. By Allah, I know nothing except goodness about Aisha." Aisha further added "Zainab was competing with me (in her beauty and the Prophet ﷺ's love), yet Allah protected her (from being malicious), for she had piety
iwh_id: Aisha (radhiyallahu 'anha) meriwayatkan bahwa (the istri of Nabi ﷺ) "Whenever Rasulullah ﷺ berniat kepada go di a journey, ia would draw lots amongst -nya para istri dan would take bersama dia the satu upon kepada siapa the lot fell. During a Ghazwa of his, ia drew lots amongst kami dan the lot fell upon me, dan aku proceeded bersama dia setelah Allah had decreed the use of the veil oleh women. aku was membawa dalam a Howdah (on the camel) dan dismounted sementara masih dalam it. When Rasulullah ﷺ was melalui bersama -nya Ghazwa dan kembali home, dan kami approached the city of Madinah, Rasulullah ﷺ memerintahkan kami kepada proceed pada night. When the perintah of setting off was given, aku berjalan hingga aku was past the army kepada answer the call of nature. After finishing aku kembali (to the camp) kepada depart (with the others) dan tiba-tiba realized bahwa -ku necklace di atas -ku dada was missing. So, aku kembali kepada look untuk itu dan was delayed karena of that. The orang-orang yang biasa carry saya di the camel, datang kepada -ku Howdah dan meletakkan itu di the punggung of the camel, thinraja bahwa aku was dalam it, as, pada bahwa time, women were ringan dalam weight, dan thin dan lean, dan did not use kepada eat much. So, itu orang-orang did not feel the difference dalam the heaviness of the Howdah sementara lifting it, dan mereka meletakkan itu di atas the camel. At bahwa waktu aku was a muda lady. Mereka set the unta moving dan proceeded on. aku menemukan -ku necklace setelah the army had gone, dan datang kepada mereka camp kepada find nobody. So, aku pergi kepada the place di mana aku biasa stay, thinraja bahwa mereka would discover -ku absence dan come punggung dalam -ku search. While dalam bahwa state, aku felt sleepy dan slept. Safwan bin Mu'attal As-Sulami Adh-Dhakwani was di belakang the army dan tiba di -ku abode dalam the morning. When ia melihat a sleeping perputra, ia datang kepada me, dan ia biasa see saya sebelum veiling. So, aku got up ketika aku mendengar dia saying, "Inna lil-lah-wa inn a ilaihi rajiun (We are untuk Allah, dan kami will return kepada Him)." Ia made -nya unta kneel down. Ia got down dari -nya camel, dan meletakkan -nya leg di the front legs of the unta kemudian aku rode dan duduk di atas it. Safwan set out walraja, leading the unta oleh the rope hingga kami tiba di the army yang had halted kepada take rest pada midday. Then barang siapa was meant untuk destruction, fell into destruction, (some orang-orang accused saya falsely) dan the leader of the salah accusers was `Abdullah bin Ubai bin Salul. After bahwa kami kembali kepada Madinah, dan aku became ill untuk satu bulan sementara the orang-orang were spreading the forged statements of the salah accusers. aku was feeling selama -ku ailment sebagaimana jika aku were not receiving the usual kebaikan dari Nabi ﷺ yang aku biasa receive dari dia ketika aku got sick. But ia would come, greet dan say, 'How is bahwa (girl)?' aku did not know anything of apa was going di hingga aku recovered dari -ku ailment dan pergi out bersama Um Mistah kepada the Manasi di mana kami biasa answer the call of nature, dan kami tidak biasa go kepada answer the call of nature kecuali dari malam kepada malam dan bahwa was sebelum kami had lavatories dekat kepada kami houses. And ini habit of ours was similar kepada the habit of the lama 'Arabs dalam the open country (or away dari houses). So. aku dan Um Mistah bint Ruhm pergi out walraja. Um Mistah stumbled karena of dia panjang dress dan di bahwa ia berkata, 'Let Mistah be ruined.' Aku berkata, 'You are saying a buruk word. Why are kamu abusing a man yang mengambil part dalam (the battle of) Badr?' Ia berkata, 'O Hanata (you there) didn't kamu hear apa mereka berkata?' Then ia memberitahu saya the rumors of the salah accusers. My sickness was aggravated, dan ketika aku kembali home, Rasulullah ﷺ datang kepada me, dan setelah greeting ia berkata, 'How is bahwa (girl)?' aku meminta dia kepada allow saya kepada go kepada -ku parents. aku wanted kemudian kepada be sure of the berita melalui them. Rasulullah ﷺ diizinkan me, dan aku pergi kepada -ku parents dan bertanya -ku ibu, 'What are the orang-orang talraja about?' Ia berkata, 'O -ku putri! Don't worry banyak tentang ini matter. By Allah, tidak pernah is di sana a charming woman mencintai oleh dia suami yang has lain para istri, namun the women would forge salah berita tentang her.' Aku berkata, 'Glorified be Allah! Are the orang-orang really talraja of ini matter?' That malam aku menjaga di weeping dan could not sleep hingga morning. In the pagi Rasulullah ﷺ called `Ali bin Abu Talib dan Usama bin Zaid ketika ia melihat the Divine Inspiration delayed, kepada consul mereka tentang divorcing -nya istri (i.e. `Aisha). Usama bin Zaid berkata apa ia mengetahui of the baik reputation of -nya para istri dan added, 'O Rasulullah ﷺ! Keep kamu istri, for, oleh Allah, kami know nothing tentang dia namun good.' `Ali bin Abu Talib berkata, 'O Rasulullah ﷺ! Allah has not imposed restrictions di you, dan di sana are banyak women lain than she, namun kamu may ask the woman-pelayan yang will tell kamu the truth.' On bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ called Barirah dan berkata, 'O Barirah. Did kamu ever see anything yang roused kamu suspicions tentang her?' Barirah berkata, 'No, oleh Allah Who has mengutus kamu bersama the Truth, aku have tidak pernah seen dalam dia anything faulty kecuali bahwa ia is a girl of immature age, yang kadang-kadang sleeps dan leaves the dough untuk the kambing kepada eat.' On bahwa hari Rasulullah ﷺ ascended the pulpit dan meminta bahwa somebody support dia dalam punishing `Abdullah bin Ubai bin Salul. Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, 'Who will support saya kepada punish bahwa perputra (`Abdullah bin Ubai bin Salul) yang has hurt saya oleh slandering the reputation of -ku family? By Allah, aku know nothing tentang -ku family namun good, dan mereka have accused a perputra tentang kepada siapa aku know nothing kecuali good, dan ia tidak pernah memasuki -ku rumah kecuali dalam -ku company.' Sa`d bin Mu`adh got up dan berkata, 'O Rasulullah ﷺ! oleh Allah, aku will relieve kamu dari him. If bahwa man is dari the tribe of the Aus, kemudian kami will chop -nya kepala off, dan jika ia is dari kami saudaras, the Khazraj, kemudian perintah us, dan kami will fulfill kamu order.' On bahwa Sa`d bin 'Ubada, the chief of the Khazraj dan sebelum ini incident, ia had been a pious man, got up, motivated oleh -nya zeal untuk -nya tribe dan berkata, 'By Allah, kamu have memberitahu a lie; kamu cannot kill him, dan kamu will tidak pernah be able kepada kill him.' On bahwa Usaid bin Al-Hudair got up dan berkata (to Sa`d bin 'Ubada), 'By Allah! kamu are a liar. By Allah, kami will kill him; dan kamu are a orang munafik, defending the orang-orang munafik.' On ini the dua tribes of Aus dan Khazraj got excited dan were tentang kepada fight masing-masing other, sementara Rasulullah ﷺ was standing di the pulpit. Ia got down dan quieted mereka hingga mereka became silent dan ia menjaga quiet. On bahwa hari aku menjaga di weeping sehingga banyak sehingga bahwa neither did -ku tears stop, nor could aku sleep. In the pagi -ku parents were bersama saya dan aku had menangis untuk dua nights dan a day, hingga aku pikiran -ku liver would burst dari weeping. While mereka were sitting bersama saya dan aku was weeping, an Anshar woman bertanya -ku izin kepada enter, dan aku diizinkan dia kepada come in. Ia duduk down dan memulai weeping bersama me. While kami were dalam ini state, Rasulullah ﷺ datang dan duduk down dan ia had tidak pernah duduk bersama saya sejak the hari mereka forged the accusation. No wahyu regarding -ku case datang kepada dia untuk a month. Ia membaca Tashah-hud (i.e. None has the benar kepada be worshipped namun Allah dan Muhammad is His Apostle) kemudian berkata, 'O `Aisha! aku have been memberitahukan such-and-such tentang you; jika kamu are innocent, kemudian Allah will segera reveal kamu innocence, dan jika kamu have committed a sin, kemudian repent kepada Allah dan ask Him kepada forgive you, untuk ketika a perputra confesses -nya dosa dan asks Allah untuk pengampunan, Allah accepts -nya taubat.' When Rasulullah ﷺ menyelesaikan -nya speech -ku tears ceased completely dan di sana remained not bahkan a single drop of it. aku meminta -ku ayah kepada reply kepada Rasulullah ﷺ di -ku behalf. My ayah berkata, By Allah, aku do not know apa kepada say kepada Rasulullah ﷺ.' Aku berkata kepada -ku ibu, 'Talk kepada Rasulullah ﷺ di -ku behalf.' Ia berkata, 'By Allah, aku do not know apa kepada say kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. aku was a muda girl dan did not have banyak ilmu of Al-Al-Qur'an. Aku berkata, 'Aku know, oleh Allah, bahwa kamu have listened kepada apa orang-orang are saying dan bahwa has been planted dalam kamu pikiran dan kamu have diambil itu sebagaimana a truth. Now, jika aku memberitahu kamu bahwa aku am innocent dan Allah knows bahwa aku am innocent, kamu would not believe saya dan jika aku mengaku kepada kamu falsely bahwa aku am guilty, dan Allah knows bahwa aku am innocent kamu would believe me. By Allah, aku don't compare -ku situation bersama kamu kecuali kepada the situation of Joseph's ayah (i.e. Jacob) yang berkata, 'So (for me) kesabaran is paling fitting terhadap bahwa yang kamu assert dan itu is Allah (Alone) yang help can be sought.' Then aku berbalik kepada the lain side of -ku bed hoping bahwa Allah would prove -ku innocence. By Allah aku tidak pernah pikiran bahwa Allah would reveal Divine Inspiration dalam -ku case, sebagaimana aku considered myself too inferior kepada be talked of dalam the Holy Al-Qur'an. aku had berharap bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ might have a dream dalam yang Allah would prove -ku innocence. By Allah, Rasulullah ﷺ had not got up dan nobody had meninggalkan the rumah sebelum the Divine Inspiration datang kepada Rasulullah ﷺ. So, di sana overtook dia the same state yang biasa overtake him, (which ia biasa have di being inspired divinely). Ia was sweating sehingga banyak sehingga bahwa the drops of the sweat were dropping seperti pearls meskipun itu was a (cold) wintry day. When bahwa state of Rasulullah ﷺ was over, ia was smiling dan the pertama word ia berkata, `Aisha! Thank Allah, untuk Allah has menyatakan kamu innocence.' My ibu memberitahu saya kepada go kepada Rasulullah ﷺ . aku replied, 'By Allah aku will not go kepada dia dan will not thank namun Allah.' So Allah revealed: "Verily! Mereka yang spread the slander are a gang di antara kamu . . ." (24.11) When Allah memberikan the declaration of -ku Innocence, Abu Bakr, yang biasa provide untuk Mistah bin Uthatha untuk ia was -nya relative, berkata, 'By Allah, aku will tidak pernah provide Mistah bersama anything karena of apa ia berkata tentang Aisha.' But Allah kemudian revealed: -- "And let not itu yang are baik dan wealthy di antara kamu swear not kepada help mereka kinsmen, itu dalam need dan itu yang meninggalkan mereka homes dalam Allah's Cause. Let mereka forgive dan overlook. Do kamu not wish bahwa Allah should forgive you? Verily! Allah is Oft-forgiving, Most Merciful." (24.22) After bahwa Abu Bakr berkata, 'Yes ! By Allah! aku seperti bahwa Allah should forgive me,' dan resumed helping Mistah kepada siapa ia biasa help before. Rasulullah ﷺ juga bertanya Zainab binti Jahsy (i.e. Nabi ﷺ's istri tentang saya saying, 'What do kamu know dan apa did kamu see?' Ia replied, 'O Rasulullah ﷺ! aku refrain kepada claim hearing or seeing apa aku have not mendengar or seen. By Allah, aku know nothing kecuali goodness tentang Aisha." Aisha further menambahkan "Zainab was competing bersama saya (in dia beauty dan Nabi ﷺ's love), namun Allah protected dia (from being malicious), untuk ia had piety

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَلَامٍ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَهَّابِ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ الْحَذَّاءُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي بَكْرَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ أَثْنَى رَجُلٌ عَلَى رَجُلٍ عِنْدَ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ وَيْلَكَ قَطَعْتَ عُنُقَ صَاحِبِكَ قَطَعْتَ عُنُقَ صَاحِبِكَ مِرَارًا ثُمَّ قَالَ مَنْ كَانَ مِنْكُمْ مَادِحًا أَخَاهُ لَا مَحَالَةَ فَلْيَقُلْ أَحْسِبُ فُلَانًا وَاللَّهُ حَسِيبُهُ وَلَا أُزَكِّي عَلَى اللَّهِ أَحَدًا أَحْسِبُهُ كَذَا وَكَذَا إِنْ كَانَ يَعْلَمُ ذَلِكَ مِنْهُ
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَلَامٍ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَهَّابِ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ الْحَذَّاءُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي بَكْرَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ أَثْنَى رَجُلٌ عَلَى رَجُلٍ عِنْدَ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ وَيْلَكَ قَطَعْتَ عُنُقَ صَاحِبِكَ قَطَعْتَ عُنُقَ صَاحِبِكَ مِرَارًا ثُمَّ قَالَ مَنْ كَانَ مِنْكُمْ مَادِحًا أَخَاهُ لَا مَحَالَةَ فَلْيَقُلْ أَحْسِبُ فُلَانًا وَاللَّهُ حَسِيبُهُ وَلَا أُزَكِّي عَلَى اللَّهِ أَحَدًا أَحْسِبُهُ كَذَا وَكَذَا إِنْ كَانَ يَعْلَمُ ذَلِكَ مِنْهُ
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ سَلَامٍ أَخْبَرَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَهَّابِ حَدَّثَنَا خَالِدٌ الْحَذَّاءُ عَنْ عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ بْنِ أَبِي بَكْرَةَ عَنْ أَبِيهِ قَالَ أَثْنَى رَجُلٌ عَلَى رَجُلٍ ع
matn_ar: ِنْدَ النَّبِيِّ صَلَّى اللَّهُ عَلَيْهِ وَسَلَّمَ فَقَالَ وَيْلَكَ قَطَعْتَ عُنُقَ صَاحِبِكَ قَطَعْتَ عُنُقَ صَاحِبِكَ مِرَارًا ثُمَّ قَالَ مَنْ كَانَ مِنْكُمْ مَادِحًا أَخَاهُ لَا مَحَالَةَ فَلْيَقُلْ أَحْسِبُ فُلَانًا وَاللَّهُ حَسِيبُهُ وَلَا أُزَكِّي عَلَى اللَّهِ أَحَدًا أَحْسِبُهُ كَذَا وَكَذَا إِنْ كَانَ يَعْلَمُ ذَلِكَ مِنْهُ
matn_ar_clean: ند النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال ويلك قطعت عنق صاحبك قطعت عنق صاحبك مرارا ثم قال من كان منكم مادحا أخاه لا محالة فليقل أحسب فلانا والله حسيبه ولا أزكي على الله أحدا أحسبه كذا وكذا إن كان يعلم ذلك منه
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Bakra:A man praised another man in front of the Prophet (ﷺ) . The Prophet (ﷺ) said to him, "Woe to you, you have cut off your companion's neck, you have cut off your companion's neck," repeating it several times and then added, "Whoever amongst you has to praise his brother should say, 'I think that he is so and so, and Allah knows exactly the truth, and I do not confirm anybody's good conduct before Allah, but I think him so and so,' if he really knows what he says about him
iwh_en: Abu Bakra (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a man praised another man in front of the Prophet ﷺ . the Prophet ﷺ said to him, "Woe to you, you have cut off your companion's neck, you have cut off your companion's neck," repeating it several times and then added, "Whoever amongst you has to praise his brother should say, 'I think that he is so and so, and Allah knows exactly the truth, and I do not confirm anybody's good conduct before Allah, but I think him so and so,' if he really knows what he says about him
iwh_id: Abu Bakra (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa a man memuji lain man dalam front of Nabi ﷺ . Nabi ﷺ berkata kepada him, "Woe kepada you, kamu have cut off kamu sahabat's neck, kamu have cut off kamu sahabat's neck," repeating itu several kali kemudian added, "Whoever amongst kamu has kepada praise -nya saudara should say, 'Aku think bahwa ia is sehingga dan so, dan Allah knows exactly the truth, dan aku do not confirm anybody's baik conduct sebelum Allah, namun aku think dia sehingga dan so,' jika ia really knows apa ia says tentang him

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ صَبَّاحٍ، حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ زَكَرِيَّاءَ، حَدَّثَنَا بُرَيْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، عَنْ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ سَمِعَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم رَجُلاً يُثْنِي عَلَى رَجُلٍ، وَيُطْرِيهِ فِي مَدْحِهِ فَقَالَ ‏ "‏ أَهْلَكْتُمْ ـ أَوْ قَطَعْتُمْ ـ ظَهْرَ الرَّجُلِ ‏"‏‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ صَبَّاحٍ، حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ زَكَرِيَّاءَ، حَدَّثَنَا بُرَيْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، عَنْ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ سَمِعَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم رَجُلاً يُثْنِي عَلَى رَجُلٍ، وَيُطْرِيهِ فِي مَدْحِهِ فَقَالَ  " أَهْلَكْتُمْ ـ أَوْ قَطَعْتُمْ ـ ظَهْرَ الرَّجُلِ ".
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ صَبَّاحٍ، حَدَّثَنَا إِسْمَاعِيلُ بْنُ زَكَرِيَّاءَ، حَدَّثَنَا بُرَيْدُ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، عَنْ أَبِي بُرْدَةَ، عَنْ أَبِي مُوسَى ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَا
matn_ar: لَ سَمِعَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم رَجُلاً يُثْنِي عَلَى رَجُلٍ، وَيُطْرِيهِ فِي مَدْحِهِ فَقَالَ " أَهْلَكْتُمْ ـ أَوْ قَطَعْتُمْ ـ ظَهْرَ الرَّجُلِ ".
matn_ar_clean: ل سمع النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم رجلا يثني على رجل، ويطريه في مدحه فقال " أهلكتم ـ أو قطعتم ـ ظهر الرجل ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Musa Al-Ash`ari:The Prophet (ﷺ) heard someone praising another and exaggerating in his praise. The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "You have ruined or cut the man's back (by praising him so much)
iwh_en: Abu Musa Al-Ash`ari (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ heard someone praising another and exaggerating in his praise. the Prophet ﷺ said, "You have ruined or cut the man's back (by praising him so much)
iwh_id: Abu Musa Al-Ash`ari (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ mendengar someone praising lain dan exaggerating dalam -nya praise. Nabi ﷺ berkata, "You have ruined or cut the man's punggung (by praising dia sehingga much)

ar: حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي نَافِعٌ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي ابْنُ عُمَرَ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَرَضَهُ يَوْمَ أُحُدٍ وَهْوَ ابْنُ أَرْبَعَ عَشْرَةَ سَنَةً، فَلَمْ يُجِزْنِي، ثُمَّ عَرَضَنِي يَوْمَ الْخَنْدَقِ وَأَنَا ابْنُ خَمْسَ عَشْرَةَ فَأَجَازَنِي‏.‏ قَالَ نَافِعٌ فَقَدِمْتُ عَلَى عُمَرَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ وَهْوَ خَلِيفَةٌ، فَحَدَّثْتُهُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ، فَقَالَ إِنَّ هَذَا لَحَدٌّ بَيْنَ الصَّغِيرِ وَالْكَبِيرِ‏.‏ وَكَتَبَ إِلَى عُمَّالِهِ أَنْ يَفْرِضُوا لِمَنْ بَلَغَ خَمْسَ عَشْرَةَ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي نَافِعٌ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي ابْنُ عُمَرَ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَرَضَهُ يَوْمَ أُحُدٍ وَهْوَ ابْنُ أَرْبَعَ عَشْرَةَ سَنَةً، فَلَمْ يُجِزْنِي، ثُمَّ عَرَضَنِي يَوْمَ الْخَنْدَقِ وَأَنَا ابْنُ خَمْسَ عَشْرَةَ فَأَجَازَنِي. قَالَ نَافِعٌ فَقَدِمْتُ عَلَى عُمَرَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ وَهْوَ خَلِيفَةٌ، فَحَدَّثْتُهُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ، فَقَالَ إِنَّ هَذَا لَحَدٌّ بَيْنَ الصَّغِيرِ وَالْكَبِيرِ. وَكَتَبَ إِلَى عُمَّالِهِ أَنْ يَفْرِضُوا لِمَنْ بَلَغَ خَمْسَ عَشْرَةَ.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ بْنُ سَعِيدٍ، حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو أُسَامَةَ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي عُبَيْدُ اللَّهِ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي نَافِعٌ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي ابْنُ عُمَرَ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أَنَّ رَسُولَ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَرَضَهُ يَوْمَ أُحُدٍ وَهْوَ ابْنُ أَرْبَعَ عَشْرَةَ سَنَةً، فَلَمْ يُجِزْنِي، ثُمَّ عَر
matn_ar: َضَنِي يَوْمَ الْخَنْدَقِ وَأَنَا ابْنُ خَمْسَ عَشْرَةَ فَأَجَازَنِي. قَالَ نَافِعٌ فَقَدِمْتُ عَلَى عُمَرَ بْنِ عَبْدِ الْعَزِيزِ وَهْوَ خَلِيفَةٌ، فَحَدَّثْتُهُ هَذَا الْحَدِيثَ، فَقَالَ إِنَّ هَذَا لَحَدٌّ بَيْنَ الصَّغِيرِ وَالْكَبِيرِ. وَكَتَبَ إِلَى عُمَّالِهِ أَنْ يَفْرِضُوا لِمَنْ بَلَغَ خَمْسَ عَشْرَةَ.
matn_ar_clean: ضني يوم الخندق وأنا ابن خمس عشرة فأجازني. قال نافع فقدمت على عمر بن عبد العزيز وهو خليفة، فحدثته هذا الحديث، فقال إن هذا لحد بين الصغير والكبير. وكتب إلى عماله أن يفرضوا لمن بلغ خمس عشرة.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Ibn `Umar:Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) called me to present myself in front of him on the eve of the battle of Uhud, while I was fourteen years of age at that time, and he did not allow me to take part in that battle, but he called me in front of him on the eve of the battle of the Trench when I was fifteen years old, and he allowed me (to join the battle)." Nafi` said, "I went to `Umar bin `Abdul `Aziz who was Caliph at that time and related the above narration to him, He said, "This age (fifteen) is the limit between childhood and manhood," and wrote to his governors to give salaries to those who reached the age of fifteen
iwh_en: Ibn `Umar (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that Allah's Messenger ﷺ called me to present myself in front of him on the eve of the battle of Uhud, while I was fourteen years of age at that time, and he did not allow me to take part in that battle, but he called me in front of him on the eve of the battle of the Trench when I was fifteen years old, and he allowed me (to join the battle)." Nafi` said, "I went to `Umar bin `Abdul `Aziz who was Caliph at that time and related the above narration to him, He said, "This age (fifteen) is the limit between childhood and manhood," and wrote to his governors to give salaries to those who reached the age of fifteen
iwh_id: Ibn `Umar (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ called saya kepada present myself dalam front of dia di the eve of the battle of Uhud, sementara aku was empat belas tahun of age pada bahwa time, dan ia did not allow saya kepada take part dalam bahwa battle, namun ia called saya dalam front of dia di the eve of the battle of the Trench ketika aku was lima belas tahun old, dan ia diizinkan saya (to join the battle)." Nafi` berkata, "Aku pergi kepada `Umar bin `Abdul `Aziz yang was Khalifah pada bahwa waktu dan related the di atas narration kepada him, Beliau bersabda, "This age (fifteen) is the limit antara anakhood dan manhood," dan menulis kepada -nya governors kepada give salaries kepada itu yang tiba di the age of fifteen

ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، حَدَّثَنَا صَفْوَانُ بْنُ سُلَيْمٍ، عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ، عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ يَبْلُغُ بِهِ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ ‏ "‏ غُسْلُ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ وَاجِبٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُحْتَلِمٍ ‏"‏‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، حَدَّثَنَا صَفْوَانُ بْنُ سُلَيْمٍ، عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ، عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ الْخُدْرِيِّ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ يَبْلُغُ بِهِ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ  " غُسْلُ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ وَاجِبٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُحْتَلِمٍ ".
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، حَدَّثَنَا سُفْيَانُ، حَدَّثَنَا صَفْوَانُ بْنُ سُلَيْمٍ، عَنْ عَطَاءِ بْنِ يَسَارٍ، عَنْ أَبِي سَعِيدٍ
matn_ar: الْخُدْرِيِّ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ يَبْلُغُ بِهِ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ " غُسْلُ يَوْمِ الْجُمُعَةِ وَاجِبٌ عَلَى كُلِّ مُحْتَلِمٍ ".
matn_ar_clean: الخدري ـ رضى الله عنه ـ يبلغ به النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال " غسل يوم الجمعة واجب على كل محتلم ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Sa`id Al-Khudri:The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "Bath on Friday is compulsory for those who have attained the age of puberty
iwh_en: Abu Sa`id Al-Khudri (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "Bath on Friday is compulsory for those who have attained the age of puberty
iwh_id: Abu Sa`id Al-Khudri (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Bath di Friday is compulsory untuk itu yang have attained the age of puberty

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ، أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ شَقِيقٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ وَهْوَ فِيهَا فَاجِرٌ، لِيَقْتَطِعَ بِهَا مَالَ امْرِئٍ مُسْلِمٍ، لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ فَقَالَ الأَشْعَثُ بْنُ قَيْسٍ فِيَّ وَاللَّهِ كَانَ ذَلِكَ، كَانَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْيَهُودِ أَرْضٌ فَجَحَدَنِي، فَقَدَّمْتُهُ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ لِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ أَلَكَ بَيِّنَةٌ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ قُلْتُ لاَ‏.‏ قَالَ فَقَالَ لِلْيَهُودِيِّ ‏"‏ احْلِفْ ‏"‏‏.‏ قَالَ قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِذًا يَحْلِفَ وَيَذْهَبَ بِمَالِي‏.‏ قَالَ فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى ‏{‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً‏}‏ إِلَى آخِرِ الآيَةِ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ، أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ شَقِيقٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم " مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ وَهْوَ فِيهَا فَاجِرٌ، لِيَقْتَطِعَ بِهَا مَالَ امْرِئٍ مُسْلِمٍ، لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ". قَالَ فَقَالَ الأَشْعَثُ بْنُ قَيْسٍ فِيَّ وَاللَّهِ كَانَ ذَلِكَ، كَانَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْيَهُودِ أَرْضٌ فَجَحَدَنِي، فَقَدَّمْتُهُ إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ لِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم " أَلَكَ بَيِّنَةٌ ". قَالَ قُلْتُ لاَ. قَالَ فَقَالَ لِلْيَهُودِيِّ " احْلِفْ ". قَالَ قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِذًا يَحْلِفَ وَيَذْهَبَ بِمَالِي. قَالَ فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً} إِلَى آخِرِ الآيَةِ.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدٌ، أَخْبَرَنَا أَبُو مُعَاوِيَةَ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ شَقِيقٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم " مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ وَهْوَ فِيهَا فَاجِرٌ، لِيَقْتَطِعَ بِهَا مَالَ امْرِئٍ مُسْلِمٍ، لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ". قَالَ فَقَالَ الأَشْعَثُ بْنُ قَيْسٍ فِيَّ وَاللَّهِ كَانَ ذَلِكَ، كَانَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ رَجُلٍ مِنَ الْيَهُودِ أَرْضٌ فَجَحَدَنِي، فَقَدَّمْتُهُ
matn_ar: إِلَى النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ لِي رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم " أَلَكَ بَيِّنَةٌ ". قَالَ قُلْتُ لاَ. قَالَ فَقَالَ لِلْيَهُودِيِّ " احْلِفْ ". قَالَ قُلْتُ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِذًا يَحْلِفَ وَيَذْهَبَ بِمَالِي. قَالَ فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَعَالَى {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً} إِلَى آخِرِ الآيَةِ.
matn_ar_clean: إلى النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال لي رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم " ألك بينة ". قال قلت لا. قال فقال لليهودي " احلف ". قال قلت يا رسول الله إذا يحلف ويذهب بمالي. قال فأنزل الله تعالى {إن الذين يشترون بعهد الله وأيمانهم ثمنا قليلا} إلى آخر الآية.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated `Abdullah:Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) said, "If somebody takes a false oath in order to get the property of a Muslim (unjustly) by that oath, then Allah will be angry with him when he will meet Him." Al-Ash'ath informed me, "By Allah! This was said regarding me. There was a dispute about a piece of land between me and a man from the Jews who denied my right. I took him to the Prophet. Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) asked me, 'Do you have an evidence?' I replied in the negative. He said to the Jew, 'Take an oath.' I said, 'O Allah's Messenger (ﷺ)! He will surely take an oath and take my property unjustly." So, Allah revealed: "Verily! Those who purchase a little gain at the cost of Allah's covenant and their oaths
iwh_en: Abdullah (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that Allah's Messenger ﷺ said, "If somebody takes a false oath in order to get the property of a Muslim (unjustly) by that oath, then Allah will be angry with him when he will meet Him." Al-Ash'ath informed me, "By Allah! This was said regarding me. There was a dispute about a piece of land between me and a man from the Jews who denied my right. I took him to the Prophet ﷺ. Allah's Messenger ﷺ asked me, 'Do you have an evidence?' I replied in the negative. He said to the Jew, 'Take an oath.' I said, 'O Allah's Messenger ﷺ! He will surely take an oath and take my property unjustly." So, Allah revealed: "Verily! Those who purchase a little gain at the cost of Allah's covenant and their oaths
iwh_id: Abdullah (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "If somebody takes a salah oath dalam perintah kepada get the property of a Muslim (unjustly) oleh bahwa oath, kemudian Allah will be angry bersama dia ketika ia will meet Him." Al-Ash'ath memberitahukan me, "By Allah! This was berkata regarding me. There was a dispute tentang a piece of tanah antara saya dan a man dari the Jews yang menyangkal -ku right. aku mengambil dia kepada Nabi ﷺ. Rasulullah ﷺ bertanya me, 'Do kamu have an evidence?' aku menjawab dalam the negative. Beliau bersabda kepada the Jew, 'Take an oath.' Aku berkata, 'O Rasulullah ﷺ! Ia will surely take an oath dan take -ku property unjustly." So, Allah revealed: "Verily! Those yang purchase a little gain pada the cost of Allah's covenant dan mereka oaths

ar: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ، حَدَّثَنَا نَافِعُ بْنُ عُمَرَ، عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ، قَالَ كَتَبَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَضَى بِالْيَمِينِ عَلَى الْمُدَّعَى عَلَيْهِ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ، حَدَّثَنَا نَافِعُ بْنُ عُمَرَ، عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ، قَالَ كَتَبَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَضَى بِالْيَمِينِ عَلَى الْمُدَّعَى عَلَيْهِ.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا أَبُو نُعَيْمٍ، حَدَّثَنَا نَافِعُ بْنُ عُ
matn_ar: مَرَ، عَنِ ابْنِ أَبِي مُلَيْكَةَ، قَالَ كَتَبَ ابْنُ عَبَّاسٍ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَضَى بِالْيَمِينِ عَلَى الْمُدَّعَى عَلَيْهِ.
matn_ar_clean: مر، عن ابن أبي مليكة، قال كتب ابن عباس ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قضى باليمين على المدعى عليه.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Ibn Abu Mulaika:Ibn `Abbas wrote that the Prophet (ﷺ) gave his verdict on the basis of the defendant's oath
iwh_en: Ibn Abu Mulaika (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that ibn `Abbas wrote that the Prophet ﷺ gave his verdict on the basis of the defendant's oath
iwh_id: Ibn Abu Mulaika (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa ibn `Abbas menulis bahwa Nabi ﷺ memberikan -nya verdict di the basis of the defendant's oath

ar: حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ، حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرٌ، عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ، عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ، قَالَ قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ يَسْتَحِقُّ بِهَا مَالاً لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ، ثُمَّ أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَصْدِيقَ ذَلِكَ ‏{‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ‏}‏ إِلَى ‏{‏عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ‏}‏‏.‏ ثُمَّ إِنَّ الأَشْعَثَ بْنَ قَيْسٍ خَرَجَ إِلَيْنَا فَقَالَ مَا يُحَدِّثُكُمْ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ فَحَدَّثْنَاهُ بِمَا، قَالَ، فَقَالَ صَدَقَ لَفِيَّ أُنْزِلَتْ، كَانَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ رَجُلٍ خُصُومَةٌ فِي شَىْءٍ، فَاخْتَصَمْنَا إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ ‏"‏ شَاهِدَاكَ أَوْ يَمِينُهُ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَقُلْتُ لَهُ إِنَّهُ إِذًا يَحْلِفُ وَلاَ يُبَالِي‏.‏ فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ يَسْتَحِقُّ بِهَا مَالاً وَهْوَ فِيهَا فَاجِرٌ لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَصْدِيقَ ذَلِكَ، ثُمَّ اقْتَرَأَ هَذِهِ الآيَةَ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ، حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرٌ، عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ، عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ، قَالَ قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ يَسْتَحِقُّ بِهَا مَالاً لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ، ثُمَّ أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَصْدِيقَ ذَلِكَ {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ} إِلَى {عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ}. ثُمَّ إِنَّ الأَشْعَثَ بْنَ قَيْسٍ خَرَجَ إِلَيْنَا فَقَالَ مَا يُحَدِّثُكُمْ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَّحْمَنِ فَحَدَّثْنَاهُ بِمَا، قَالَ، فَقَالَ صَدَقَ لَفِيَّ أُنْزِلَتْ، كَانَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ رَجُلٍ خُصُومَةٌ فِي شَىْءٍ، فَاخْتَصَمْنَا إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ " شَاهِدَاكَ أَوْ يَمِينُهُ ". فَقُلْتُ لَهُ إِنَّهُ إِذًا يَحْلِفُ وَلاَ يُبَالِي. فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم " مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ يَسْتَحِقُّ بِهَا مَالاً وَهْوَ فِيهَا فَاجِرٌ لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ". فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَصْدِيقَ ذَلِكَ، ثُمَّ اقْتَرَأَ هَذِهِ الآيَةَ.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عُثْمَانُ بْنُ أَبِي شَيْبَةَ، حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرٌ، عَنْ مَنْصُورٍ، عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ، قَالَ قَالَ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ يَسْتَحِقُّ بِهَا مَالاً لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ، ثُمَّ أَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَصْدِيقَ ذَلِكَ {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ} إِلَى {عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ}. ثُمَّ إِنَّ الأَشْعَثَ بْنَ قَيْسٍ خَرَجَ إِلَيْنَا فَقَالَ مَا يُحَدِّثُكُمْ أَبُو عَبْدِ الرَ
matn_ar: ّحْمَنِ فَحَدَّثْنَاهُ بِمَا، قَالَ، فَقَالَ صَدَقَ لَفِيَّ أُنْزِلَتْ، كَانَ بَيْنِي وَبَيْنَ رَجُلٍ خُصُومَةٌ فِي شَىْءٍ، فَاخْتَصَمْنَا إِلَى رَسُولِ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم فَقَالَ " شَاهِدَاكَ أَوْ يَمِينُهُ ". فَقُلْتُ لَهُ إِنَّهُ إِذًا يَحْلِفُ وَلاَ يُبَالِي. فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم " مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ يَسْتَحِقُّ بِهَا مَالاً وَهْوَ فِيهَا فَاجِرٌ لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ". فَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَصْدِيقَ ذَلِكَ، ثُمَّ اقْتَرَأَ هَذِهِ الآيَةَ.
matn_ar_clean: حمن فحدثناه بما، قال، فقال صدق لفي أنزلت، كان بيني وبين رجل خصومة في شىء، فاختصمنا إلى رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم فقال " شاهداك أو يمينه ". فقلت له إنه إذا يحلف ولا يبالي. فقال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم " من حلف على يمين يستحق بها مالا وهو فيها فاجر لقي الله وهو عليه غضبان ". فأنزل الله تصديق ذلك، ثم اقترأ هذه الآية.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Wail:`Abdullah (bin Mas`ud) said, "Whoever takes a (false) oath in order to grab some property (unjustly), Allah will be angry with him when he will meet Him. Allah confirmed that through His Divine Revelation: "Verily! Those who purchase a little gain at the cost of Allah's covenant and their oaths . . . they will have a painful punishment." (3.77) Al-Ash'ath bin Qais came to us and asked, 'What is Abu `Abdur-Rahman (i.e. `Abdullah) telling you? 'We told him what he was narrating to us. He said, 'He was telling the truth; this Divine Verse was revealed in connection with me. There was a dispute between me and another man about something and the case was filed before Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) who said, 'Produce your two witnesses or else the defendant is to take an oath.' I said, The defendant will surely take a (false) oath caring for nothing.' The Prophet (ﷺ) said, 'Whoever takes a false oath in order to grab (other's) property, then Allah will be angry with him when he will meet Him.' Then Allah revealed its confirmation. Al-Ashath then recited the above Divine Verse
iwh_en: Abu Wail (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that abdullah (bin Mas`ud) said, "Whoever takes a (false) oath in order to grab some property (unjustly), Allah will be angry with him when he will meet Him. Allah confirmed that through His Divine Revelation: "Verily! Those who purchase a little gain at the cost of Allah's covenant and their oaths . . . they will have a painful punishment." (3.77) Al-Ash'ath bin Qais came to us and asked, 'What is Abu `Abdur-Rahman (i.e. `Abdullah) telling you? 'We told him what he was narrating to us. He said, 'He was telling the truth; this Divine Verse was revealed in connection with me. There was a dispute between me and another man about something and the case was filed before Allah's Messenger ﷺ who said, 'Produce your two witnesses or else the defendant is to take an oath.' I said, The defendant will surely take a (false) oath caring for nothing.' the Prophet ﷺ said, 'Whoever takes a false oath in order to grab (other's) property, then Allah will be angry with him when he will meet Him.' Then Allah revealed its confirmation. Al-Ashath then recited the above Divine Verse
iwh_id: Abu Wail (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa abdullah (bin Mas`ud) berkata, "Whoever takes a (false) oath dalam perintah kepada grab beberapa property (unjustly), Allah will be angry bersama dia ketika ia will meet Him. Allah membenarkan bahwa melalui His Divine Wahyu: "Verily! Those yang purchase a little gain pada the cost of Allah's covenant dan mereka oaths . . . mereka will have a painful punishment." (3.77) Al-Ash'ath bin Qais datang kepada kami dan asked, 'What is Abu `Abdur-Rahman (i.e. `Abdullah) telling you? 'We memberitahu dia apa ia was narrating kepada us. Beliau bersabda, 'He was telling the truth; ini Divine ayat was mengungkapkan dalam connection bersama me. There was a dispute antara saya dan lain man tentang something dan the case was filed sebelum Rasulullah ﷺ yang berkata, 'Produce kamu dua witnesses or else the defendant is kepada take an oath.' Aku berkata, The defendant will surely take a (false) oath caring untuk nothing.' Nabi ﷺ berkata, 'Whoever takes a salah oath dalam perintah kepada grab (other's) property, kemudian Allah will be angry bersama dia ketika ia will meet Him.' Then Allah mengungkapkan -nya confirmation. Al-Ashath kemudian membaca the di atas Divine ayat

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ، عَنْ هِشَامٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عِكْرِمَةُ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أَنَّ هِلاَلَ بْنَ أُمَيَّةَ، قَذَفَ امْرَأَتَهُ عِنْدَ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِشَرِيكِ بْنِ سَحْمَاءَ، فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏"‏ الْبَيِّنَةُ أَوْ حَدٌّ فِي ظَهْرِكَ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِذَا رَأَى أَحَدُنَا عَلَى امْرَأَتِهِ رَجُلاً يَنْطَلِقُ يَلْتَمِسُ الْبَيِّنَةَ فَجَعَلَ يَقُولُ ‏"‏ الْبَيِّنَةَ وَإِلاَّ حَدٌّ فِي ظَهْرِكَ ‏"‏‏.‏ فَذَكَرَ حَدِيثَ اللِّعَانِ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ، عَنْ هِشَامٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عِكْرِمَةُ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أَنَّ هِلاَلَ بْنَ أُمَيَّةَ، قَذَفَ امْرَأَتَهُ عِنْدَ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم بِشَرِيكِ بْنِ سَحْمَاءَ، فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم " الْبَيِّنَةُ أَوْ حَدٌّ فِي ظَهْرِكَ ". فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِذَا رَأَى أَحَدُنَا عَلَى امْرَأَتِهِ رَجُلاً يَنْطَلِقُ يَلْتَمِسُ الْبَيِّنَةَ فَجَعَلَ يَقُولُ " الْبَيِّنَةَ وَإِلاَّ حَدٌّ فِي ظَهْرِكَ ". فَذَكَرَ حَدِيثَ اللِّعَانِ.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ بَشَّارٍ، حَدَّثَنَا ابْنُ أَبِي عَدِيٍّ، عَنْ هِشَامٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عِكْرِمَةُ، عَنِ ابْنِ عَبَّاسٍ ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ أَنَّ هِلاَلَ بْنَ أُمَيَّةَ، قَذَفَ امْرَأَتَهُ عِنْدَ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عل
matn_ar: يه وسلم بِشَرِيكِ بْنِ سَحْمَاءَ، فَقَالَ النَّبِيُّ صلى الله عليه وسلم " الْبَيِّنَةُ أَوْ حَدٌّ فِي ظَهْرِكَ ". فَقَالَ يَا رَسُولَ اللَّهِ إِذَا رَأَى أَحَدُنَا عَلَى امْرَأَتِهِ رَجُلاً يَنْطَلِقُ يَلْتَمِسُ الْبَيِّنَةَ فَجَعَلَ يَقُولُ " الْبَيِّنَةَ وَإِلاَّ حَدٌّ فِي ظَهْرِكَ ". فَذَكَرَ حَدِيثَ اللِّعَانِ.
matn_ar_clean: يه وسلم بشريك بن سحماء، فقال النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم " البينة أو حد في ظهرك ". فقال يا رسول الله إذا رأى أحدنا على امرأته رجلا ينطلق يلتمس البينة فجعل يقول " البينة وإلا حد في ظهرك ". فذكر حديث اللعان.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Ibn `Abbas:Hilal bin Umaiya accused his wife before the Prophet (ﷺ) of committing illegal sexual intercourse with Sharik bin Sahma.' The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "Produce a proof, or else you would get the legal punishment (by being lashed) on your back." Hilal said, "O Allah's Messenger (ﷺ)! If anyone of us saw another man over his wife, would he go to search for a proof." The Prophet (ﷺ) went on saying, "Produce a proof or else you would get the legal punishment (by being lashed) on your back." The Prophet (ﷺ) then mentioned the narration of Lian (as in the Holy Book). (Surat-al-Nur:)
iwh_en: Ibn `Abbas (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that hilal bin Umaiya accused his wife before the Prophet ﷺ of committing illegal sexual intercourse with Sharik bin Sahma.' the Prophet ﷺ said, "Produce a proof, or else you would get the legal punishment (by being lashed) on your back." Hilal said, "O Allah's Messenger ﷺ! If anyone of us saw another man over his wife, would he go to search for a proof." the Prophet ﷺ went on saying, "Produce a proof or else you would get the legal punishment (by being lashed) on your back." the Prophet ﷺ then mentioned the narration of Lian (as in the Holy Book). (Surat-al-Nur:)
iwh_id: Ibn `Abbas (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa hilal bin Umaiya accused -nya istri sebelum Nabi ﷺ of committing illegal sexual intercourse bersama Sharik bin Sahma.' Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Produce a proof, or else kamu would get the legal hukuman (by being lashed) di kamu back." Hilal berkata, "O Rasulullah ﷺ! If anyone of kami melihat lain man di atas -nya istri, would ia go kepada search untuk a proof." Nabi ﷺ pergi di saying, "Produce a proof or else kamu would get the legal hukuman (by being lashed) di kamu back." Nabi ﷺ kemudian menyebut the narration of Lian (as dalam the Holy Book). (Surat-al-Nur:)

ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ أَبِي صَالِحٍ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم ‏ "‏ ثَلاَثَةٌ لاَ يُكَلِّمُهُمُ اللَّهُ، وَلاَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلاَ يُزَكِّيهِمْ، وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ رَجُلٌ عَلَى فَضْلِ مَاءٍ بِطَرِيقٍ يَمْنَعُ مِنْهُ ابْنَ السَّبِيلِ، وَرَجُلٌ بَايَعَ رَجُلاً لاَ يُبَايِعُهُ إِلاَّ لِلدُّنْيَا، فَإِنْ أَعْطَاهُ مَا يُرِيدُ وَفَى لَهُ، وَإِلاَّ لَمْ يَفِ لَهُ، وَرَجُلٌ سَاوَمَ رَجُلاً بِسِلْعَةٍ بَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ، فَحَلَفَ بِاللَّهِ لَقَدْ أُعْطِيَ بِهِ كَذَا وَكَذَا، فَأَخَذَهَا ‏"‏‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ أَبِي صَالِحٍ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم  " ثَلاَثَةٌ لاَ يُكَلِّمُهُمُ اللَّهُ، وَلاَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلاَ يُزَكِّيهِمْ، وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ رَجُلٌ عَلَى فَضْلِ مَاءٍ بِطَرِيقٍ يَمْنَعُ مِنْهُ ابْنَ السَّبِيلِ، وَرَجُلٌ بَايَعَ رَجُلاً لاَ يُبَايِعُهُ إِلاَّ لِلدُّنْيَا، فَإِنْ أَعْطَاهُ مَا يُرِيدُ وَفَى لَهُ، وَإِلاَّ لَمْ يَفِ لَهُ، وَرَجُلٌ سَاوَمَ رَجُلاً بِسِلْعَةٍ بَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ، فَحَلَفَ بِاللَّهِ لَقَدْ أُعْطِيَ بِهِ كَذَا وَكَذَا، فَأَخَذَهَا ".
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا عَلِيُّ بْنُ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ، حَدَّثَنَا جَرِيرُ بْنُ عَبْدِ الْحَمِيدِ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ أَ
matn_ar: بِي صَالِحٍ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قَالَ قَالَ رَسُولُ اللَّهِ صلى الله عليه وسلم " ثَلاَثَةٌ لاَ يُكَلِّمُهُمُ اللَّهُ، وَلاَ يَنْظُرُ إِلَيْهِمْ وَلاَ يُزَكِّيهِمْ، وَلَهُمْ عَذَابٌ أَلِيمٌ رَجُلٌ عَلَى فَضْلِ مَاءٍ بِطَرِيقٍ يَمْنَعُ مِنْهُ ابْنَ السَّبِيلِ، وَرَجُلٌ بَايَعَ رَجُلاً لاَ يُبَايِعُهُ إِلاَّ لِلدُّنْيَا، فَإِنْ أَعْطَاهُ مَا يُرِيدُ وَفَى لَهُ، وَإِلاَّ لَمْ يَفِ لَهُ، وَرَجُلٌ سَاوَمَ رَجُلاً بِسِلْعَةٍ بَعْدَ الْعَصْرِ، فَحَلَفَ بِاللَّهِ لَقَدْ أُعْطِيَ بِهِ كَذَا وَكَذَا، فَأَخَذَهَا ".
matn_ar_clean: بي صالح، عن أبي هريرة ـ رضى الله عنه ـ قال قال رسول الله صلى الله عليه وسلم " ثلاثة لا يكلمهم الله، ولا ينظر إليهم ولا يزكيهم، ولهم عذاب أليم رجل على فضل ماء بطريق يمنع منه ابن السبيل، ورجل بايع رجلا لا يبايعه إلا للدنيا، فإن أعطاه ما يريد وفى له، وإلا لم يف له، ورجل ساوم رجلا بسلعة بعد العصر، فحلف بالله لقد أعطي به كذا وكذا، فأخذها ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Huraira:Allah's Messenger (ﷺ) said, "There are three persons whom Allah will neither talk to nor look at, nor purify from (the sins), and they will have a painful punishment. (They are): (1) A man who possessed superfluous water on a way and he withheld it from the travelers. (2) a man who gives a pledge of allegiance to a Muslim ruler and gives it only for worldly gains. If the ruler gives him what he wants, he remains obedient to It, otherwise he does not abide by it, and (3) a man bargains with another man after the `Asr prayer and the latter takes a false oath in the Name of Allah claiming that he has been offered so much for the thing and the former (believes him and) buys it
iwh_en: Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that Allah's Messenger ﷺ said, "There are three persons whom Allah will neither talk to nor look at, nor purify from (the sins), and they will have a painful punishment. (They are): (1) A man who possessed superfluous water on a way and he withheld it from the travelers. (2) a man who gives a pledge of allegiance to a Muslim ruler and gives it only for worldly gains. If the ruler gives him what he wants, he remains obedient to It, otherwise he does not abide by it, and (3) a man bargains with another man after the `Asr prayer and the latter takes a false oath in the Name of Allah claiming that he has been offered so much for the thing and the former (believes him and) buys it
iwh_id: Abu Huraira (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Rasulullah ﷺ berkata, "There are tiga perputras kepada siapa Allah will neither talk kepada nor look at, nor purify dari (the sins), dan mereka will have a painful punishment. (They are): (1) A man yang possessed superfluous air di a way dan ia withheld itu dari the travelers. (2) a man yang gives a pledge of allegiance kepada a Muslim penguasa dan gives itu hanya untuk worldly gains. If the penguasa gives dia apa ia wants, ia remains obedient kepada It, otherwise ia does not abide oleh it, dan (3) a man bargains bersama lain man setelah the Asar shalat dan the latter takes a salah oath dalam the Name of Allah claiming bahwa ia has been melaksanakan sehingga banyak untuk the thing dan the former (believes dia and) buys it

ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَاحِدِ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ مَسْعُودٍ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ ‏ "‏ مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ لِيَقْتَطِعَ بِهَا مَالاً لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ‏"‏‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَاحِدِ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ مَسْعُودٍ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ  " مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ لِيَقْتَطِعَ بِهَا مَالاً لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ".
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنَا مُوسَى بْنُ إِسْمَاعِيلَ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الْوَاحِدِ، عَنِ الأَعْمَشِ، عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ، عَنِ ابْنِ مَسْعُود
matn_ar: ٍ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ " مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ لِيَقْتَطِعَ بِهَا مَالاً لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ".
matn_ar_clean: ـ رضى الله عنه ـ عن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم قال " من حلف على يمين ليقتطع بها مالا لقي الله وهو عليه غضبان ".
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Ibn Mas`ud:The Prophet (ﷺ) said, "Whoever takes a (false) oath in order to grab (other's) property, then Allah will be angry with him when he will meet Him
iwh_en: Ibn Mas`ud (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ said, "Whoever takes a (false) oath in order to grab (other's) property, then Allah will be angry with him when he will meet Him
iwh_id: Ibn Mas`ud (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ berkata, "Whoever takes a (false) oath dalam perintah kepada grab (other's) property, kemudian Allah will be angry bersama dia ketika ia will meet Him

ar: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ، أَخْبَرَنَا مَعْمَرٌ، عَنْ هَمَّامٍ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَرَضَ عَلَى قَوْمٍ الْيَمِينَ فَأَسْرَعُوا، فَأَمَرَ أَنْ يُسْهَمَ بَيْنَهُمْ فِي الْيَمِينِ أَيُّهُمْ يَحْلِفُ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ، أَخْبَرَنَا مَعْمَرٌ، عَنْ هَمَّامٍ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَرَضَ عَلَى قَوْمٍ الْيَمِينَ فَأَسْرَعُوا، فَأَمَرَ أَنْ يُسْهَمَ بَيْنَهُمْ فِي الْيَمِينِ أَيُّهُمْ يَحْلِفُ.
matn_ar: حَدَّثَنَا إِسْحَاقُ بْنُ نَصْرٍ، حَدَّثَنَا عَبْدُ الرَّزَّاقِ، أَخْبَرَنَا مَعْمَرٌ، عَنْ هَمَّامٍ، عَنْ أَبِي هُرَيْرَةَ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أَنَّ النَّبِيَّ صلى الله عليه وسلم عَرَضَ عَلَى قَوْمٍ الْيَمِينَ فَأَسْرَعُوا، فَأَمَرَ أَنْ يُسْهَمَ بَيْنَهُمْ فِي الْيَمِينِ أَيُّهُمْ يَحْلِفُ‏.‏
matn_ar_clean: حدثنا إسحاق بن نصر، حدثنا عبد الرزاق، أخبرنا معمر، عن همام، عن أبي هريرة ـ رضى الله عنه ـ أن النبي صلى الله عليه وسلم عرض على قوم اليمين فأسرعوا، فأمر أن يسهم بينهم في اليمين أيهم يحلف‏.‏
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated Abu Huraira:The Prophet (ﷺ) asked some people to take an oath, and they hurried for it. The Prophet (ﷺ) ordered that lots should be drawn amongst them as to who would take an oath first
iwh_en: Abu Huraira (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that the Prophet ﷺ asked some people to take an oath, and they hurried for it. the Prophet ﷺ ordered that lots should be drawn amongst them as to who would take an oath first
iwh_id: Abu Huraira (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa Nabi ﷺ bertanya beberapa orang-orang kepada take an oath, dan mereka hurried untuk it. Nabi ﷺ memerintahkan bahwa lots should be drawn amongst mereka sebagaimana kepada yang would take an oath first

ar: حَدَّثَنِي إِسْحَاقُ، أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ، أَخْبَرَنَا الْعَوَّامُ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ أَبُو إِسْمَاعِيلَ السَّكْسَكِيُّ، سَمِعَ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ أَبِي أَوْفَى ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ يَقُولُ أَقَامَ رَجُلٌ سِلْعَتَهُ فَحَلَفَ بِاللَّهِ لَقَدْ أُعْطِيَ بِهَا مَا لَمْ يُعْطَهَا فَنَزَلَتْ ‏{‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً‏}‏ وَقَالَ ابْنُ أَبِي أَوْفَى النَّاجِشُ آكِلُ رِبًا خَائِنٌ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنِي إِسْحَاقُ، أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ، أَخْبَرَنَا الْعَوَّامُ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ أَبُو إِسْمَاعِيلَ السَّكْسَكِيُّ، سَمِعَ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ أَبِي أَوْفَى ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ يَقُولُ أَقَامَ رَجُلٌ سِلْعَتَهُ فَحَلَفَ بِاللَّهِ لَقَدْ أُعْطِيَ بِهَا مَا لَمْ يُعْطَهَا فَنَزَلَتْ {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً} وَقَالَ ابْنُ أَبِي أَوْفَى النَّاجِشُ آكِلُ رِبًا خَائِنٌ.
isnad_ar: حَدَّثَنِي إِسْحَاقُ، أَخْبَرَنَا يَزِيدُ بْنُ هَارُونَ، أَخْبَرَنَا الْعَوَّامُ، قَالَ حَدَّثَنِي إِبْرَاهِيمُ أَبُو إِسْمَاعِيلَ السَّكْسَكِيُّ، سَمِعَ عَبْدَ اللَّهِ بْنَ أَبِي أَوْفَى ـ رضى الله عنهما ـ يَقُولُ أَقَامَ رَجُلٌ سِلْعَتَهُ فَح
matn_ar: َلَفَ بِاللَّهِ لَقَدْ أُعْطِيَ بِهَا مَا لَمْ يُعْطَهَا فَنَزَلَتْ {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً} وَقَالَ ابْنُ أَبِي أَوْفَى النَّاجِشُ آكِلُ رِبًا خَائِنٌ.
matn_ar_clean: لف بالله لقد أعطي بها ما لم يعطها فنزلت {إن الذين يشترون بعهد الله وأيمانهم ثمنا قليلا} وقال ابن أبي أوفى الناجش آكل ربا خائن.
sunnah_ref_en: Narrated `Abdullah bin Abu `Aufa:A man displayed some goods in the market and took a false oath that he had been offered so much for them though he was not offered that amount Then the following Divine Verse was revealed:-- "Verily! Those who purchase a little gain at the cost of Allah's covenant and their oaths . . . Will get painful punishment." (3.77) Ibn Abu `Aufa added, "Such person as described above is a treacherous Riba eater (i.e. eater of usury)
iwh_en: Abdullah bin Abu `Aufa (may Allah be pleased with him) reported that a man displayed some goods in the market and took a false oath that he had been offered so much for them though he was not offered that amount Then the following Divine Verse was revealed:-- "Verily! Those who purchase a little gain at the cost of Allah's covenant and their oaths . . . Will get painful punishment." (3.77) Ibn Abu `Aufa added, "Such person as described above is a treacherous Riba eater (i.e. eater of usury)
iwh_id: Abdullah bin Abu `Aufa (radhiyallahu 'anhu) meriwayatkan bahwa a man displayed beberapa goods dalam the pasar dan mengambil a salah oath bahwa ia had been melaksanakan sehingga banyak untuk mereka meskipun ia was not melaksanakan bahwa amount Then the following Divine ayat was revealed:-- "Verily! Those yang purchase a little gain pada the cost of Allah's covenant dan mereka oaths . . . Will get painful punishment." (3.77) Ibn Abu `Aufa added, "Such perputra sebagaimana described di atas is a treacherous Riba eater (i.e. eater of usury)

ar: حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ، حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ، عَنْ شُعْبَةَ، عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ، عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ ‏"‏ مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ كَاذِبًا لِيَقْتَطِعَ مَالَ رَجُلٍ ـ أَوْ قَالَ أَخِيهِ ـ لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ‏"‏‏.‏ وَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَصْدِيقَ ذَلِكَ فِي الْقُرْآنِ ‏{‏إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً‏}‏ الآيَةَ‏.‏ فَلَقِيَنِي الأَشْعَثُ فَقَالَ مَا حَدَّثَكُمْ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ الْيَوْمَ، قُلْتُ كَذَا وَكَذَا‏.‏ قَالَ فِيَّ أُنْزِلَتْ‏.‏
ar_clean: حَدَّثَنَا بِشْرُ بْنُ خَالِدٍ، حَدَّثَنَا مُحَمَّدُ بْنُ جَعْفَرٍ، عَنْ شُعْبَةَ، عَنْ سُلَيْمَانَ، عَنْ أَبِي وَائِلٍ، عَنْ عَبْدِ اللَّهِ ـ رضى الله عنه ـ عَنِ النَّبِيِّ صلى الله عليه وسلم قَالَ " مَنْ حَلَفَ عَلَى يَمِينٍ كَاذِبًا لِيَقْتَطِعَ مَالَ رَجُلٍ ـ أَوْ قَالَ أَخِيهِ ـ لَقِيَ اللَّهَ وَهْوَ عَلَيْهِ غَضْبَانُ ". وَأَنْزَلَ اللَّهُ تَصْدِيقَ ذَلِكَ فِي الْقُرْآنِ {إِنَّ الَّذِينَ يَشْتَرُونَ بِعَهْدِ اللَّهِ وَأَيْمَانِهِمْ ثَمَنًا قَلِيلاً} الآيَةَ. فَلَقِيَنِي الأَشْعَثُ فَقَالَ مَا حَدَّثَكُمْ عَبْدُ اللَّهِ الْيَوْمَ، قُلْتُ كَذَا وَكَذَا. قَالَ فِيَّ أُنْزِلَتْ.
